name: hud_ui_text_label_set_text_fmt
description: HudUiTextLabel::SetTextFmt formats text with vsprintf, optionally updates centered extents, invalidates the element, and clears text without invalidation when passed null.
known_limits: Depends on UpdateTextExtents, which is functionally accepted but remains binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SetTextFmt@HudUiTextLabel@@QAAXPBDZZ at 0x4bccf0 still fails: 23 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 75 bytes and the VC object symbol is 80 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows a null-format clear path, otherwise varargs formatting into the text buffer, optional UpdateTextExtents when centerText is set, and invalidation.
The native text-label smoke validates formatted text, centered extents, invalidation, and null-format clearing without invalidation.
